data.name: ADWH01001_Title
data.value: Missing blank line before control flow statement

data.name: ADWH01001_Message
data.value: Add a blank line before '{0}' statement (unless first in scope or preceded by a comment)

data.name: ADWH01001_Description
data.value: Control flow statements (if, else, foreach, for, while, switch, try, catch) must be preceded by a blank line unless they are the first statement in their scope or immediately preceded by a comment.

data.name: ADWH01002_Title
data.value: Missing blank line after control flow statement

data.name: ADWH01002_Message
data.value: Add a blank line after the closing brace of '{0}' statement (unless last in scope)

data.name: ADWH01002_Description
data.value: Control flow statements must be followed by a blank line after their closing brace unless they are the last statement in their parent scope.

data.name: ADWH01003_Message
data.value: Remove blank line before 'else' keyword to keep if-else pair visually connected

data.name: ADWH01003_Description
data.value: Do not add a blank line between an 'if' block's closing brace and its 'else' keyword. The blank line visually disconnects the if-else pair.

data.name: ADWH01004_Message
data.value: Remove blank line before 'catch' keyword to keep try-catch pair visually connected

data.name: ADWH01004_Description
data.value: Do not add a blank line between a 'try' block's (or prior 'catch' block's) closing brace and the next 'catch' keyword. The blank line visually disconnects the try-catch pair.

data.name: ADWH02001_Message
data.value: Use 'String.{0}' instead of 'string.{0}' for static member access

data.name: ADWH02001_Description
data.value: Static members of the String type must use the PascalCase 'String.' prefix (e.g., String.Equals, String.IsNullOrWhiteSpace) rather than the lowercase 'string.' keyword.

data.name: ADWH03001_Title
data.value: Do not call ILogger.LogXxx methods directly

data.name: ADWH03001_Message
data.value: Do not call 'ILogger.{0}' directly; use a [LoggerMessage] source-generated extension method instead

data.name: ADWH03001_Description
data.value: All logging must use [LoggerMessage] source-generated extension methods. Direct calls to ILogger.LogInformation(), ILogger.LogError(), ILogger.LogWarning(), ILogger.LogDebug(), ILogger.LogCritical(), and ILogger.Log() are forbidden.
